name: aytn-legacy-folder-notice
description: The Next.js app was moved to the repository root (parent folder).

scripts.dev:
node -e "console.error('
  The app is no longer in ./web
  From the repo root run:
    cd ..
    npm install
    npm run dev
'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.build: node -e "console.error('Run npm run build from the repo root (parent folder).'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.start: node -e "console.error('Run npm start from the repo root (parent folder).'); process.exit(1)"
